market.nature: OTP (one time purchase). No returning customers. Every acquisition must count.
market.decisionWindow: Short. Gender reveals have a hard deadline (the party date). Urgency is real, not manufactured.
market.avgPartySpend: $250 to $1000+ total. Product portion is $50 to $200.
market.impulseLevel: High. Emotional, event driven, short consideration window. Ads fatigue fast.

tactics.name: Tiered threshold rewards
tactics.detail: Free shipping at $75. Free gift (mini confetti popper) at $100. VIP bonus (party planning printable) at $150.

tactics.name: Free shipping threshold
tactics.detail: Set 20 to 40% above current AOV. If AOV is $70, threshold at $89 to $99. 58% of shoppers add items to reach threshold.

tactics.name: Bridge products
tactics.detail: Curate add ons priced $8 to $15: reveal stickers, voting cards, photo props, balloon garlands.
tactics.expectedLift: Fills the gap between current cart and threshold

tactics.name: Good Better Best bundle architecture
tactics.detail: Essential ($79) / Premium ($129) / Ultimate ($179). Always show individual prices to anchor savings.

tactics.name: Peace of mind upsell
tactics.detail: What if the cannon doesn't fire? Sell backup packs. You cannot redo this moment. Insurance framing.

aovStrategy.keyInsight: Customers buy duplicates and backups because they cannot redo the moment. Sell peace of mind packs with extras, backup colours, and re shoot supplies.

ranked.why: Real couples filming the reveal moment. 79% say UGC influences buying. First 2 to 3 seconds are everything.
Boring backyard to epic gender reveal setup. Visual hook is strong.
Stress of planning a reveal, solved by one bundle. Drives AOV.
Multiple reveal reaction clips stitched together. Volume of proof.
Gender reveals have a hard deadline. Real urgency.

phase1_testing.purpose: Creative testing. ABO guarantees every creative/audience gets equal budget.
phase1_testing.setup: 3 to 5 ad sets per campaign, 8 to 10 creative variations per round
phase1_testing.budget: Enough for 50 conversions per week total

phase2_scaling.purpose: Graduate winners into CBO using post ID duplication (preserves social proof)
phase2_scaling.setup: CBO budget at 5 to 10x target CPA minimum

phase3_mature.purpose: ASC as workhorse with small manual CBO for tests
phase3_mature.requirement: 50+ purchase events per week through pixel

budgetRules.whyConservative: Aggressive scaling disrupts learning phase and spikes costs

ascBestPractices: Minimum 5 to 10 ad variations per ASC campaign
ASC delivers 22% higher ROAS and 9% lower CPA vs traditional targeting
Retargeting video viewers achieves 3.2x higher CTR and 41% lower CPA
Let creative be the targeting. Meta algorithm evaluates engagement signals.

highAovBasket.item: Primary reveal: 2 to 4 confetti cannons or powder cannons
Secondary reveal: Smoke bombs for dramatic outdoor effect
Backup: Extra pack in opposite colour (both colours bought pre reveal)
Accessories: Voting stickers, photo props, scratch cards

bundleTiers.name: Complete Party
bundleTiers.contents: Cannons + smoke + decorations + voting cards + photo props

bundleTiers.name: Ultimate Package
bundleTiers.contents: Everything above + personalised banner + planning guide + sparklers

verticalStrategy.recommendation: Stay in product ecommerce. Expand horizontally (complete party supplies, personalisation, digital add ons) rather than vertically into services.
highPotential: Party planning printable kits (near zero COGS, $15 to $30 AOV boost)
Digital content/guides as value add or lead magnet
Personalisation (custom names/dates on products for $10 to $20 upcharge)

killRuleReasoning.cpaBreach: CPA exceeding 2.5x target for 3 days means the ad has found the wrong audience or creative is dead. Cut it.
killRuleReasoning.frequencyBreach: Frequency above 6 on cold = audience exhausted. No amount of spend fixes a saturated pool.
killRuleReasoning.ctrDrop: 40% CTR drop from baseline = creative fatigue. The hook is dead. Rotate.
killRuleReasoning.zeroPurchase: Spending 2x CPA target with zero conversions in 72 hours = something is fundamentally broken.
killRuleReasoning.cpmSpike: CPM rising 30% WoW with flat CTR = auction competition increasing for same audience. Time to refresh.

cashFlowPrinciples.rule1: Never increase daily spend by more than 20% in a single edit. 15% is safer.
cashFlowPrinciples.rule2: Wait at least 3 days between budget increases to let Meta reoptimise.
cashFlowPrinciples.rule3: Kill losers fast (3 days data) but let winners run (scale only after 5 day confirmation).
cashFlowPrinciples.rule4: Cash flow > vanity metrics. ROAS means nothing if CPA eats your margin.
cashFlowPrinciples.rule5: At 30% margin, breakeven ROAS is 3.33. Anything below that is losing money.
cashFlowPrinciples.rule6: Fail fast: test 8 to 10 creatives, kill 80% in week 1, double down on 20%.
cashFlowPrinciples.rule7: OTP business = no LTV to fall back on. Every order must be profitable at first purchase.
